2606.25009.title: Noise-Aware Boundary-Enhanced Generative Learning for Ultrasound Speckle Reduction
2606.25009.paper_summary: Ultrasound is a non-invasive, real-time, and cost-effective imaging technique widely used in clinical diagnosis. However, its diagnostic efficacy is often compromised by inherent speckle noise that degrades image quality and obscures underlying anatomical structures. Existing speckle reduction methods tend to over-smooth tissue boundaries and generalize poorly to heterogeneous noise levels. To address these limitations, we propose a Noise-Aware Boundary-Enhanced Generative Learning (NBGL) framework for ultrasound speckle reduction, which simultaneously preserves annotated anatomical boundaries and adapts to varying noise levels. The NBGL framework consists of a speckle reduction branch and a boundary enhancement branch. The former leverages generative learning to suppress speckle noise, while the latter learns boundary-sensitive representations to preserve target anatomical structures. Furthermore, a noise-aware interaction weight generation (NIWG) module estimates the speckle noise level via 3D Laplacian filtering and a median absolute deviation estimator, and translates it into an adaptive interaction weight. This weight is incorporated into a weighted feature-wise linear modulation (wFiLM) module to adaptively modulate cross-branch feature coupling, thereby improving robustness to varying noise levels. Extensive evaluations on 141 3D transvaginal ultrasound volumes demonstrate that NBGL consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in speckle reduction and structural preservation across six noise levels, while maintaining consistency with annotated anatomical boundaries.
2606.25009.paper_summary_zh: 超聲波是一種非侵入性、實時且具成本效益的影像技術，廣泛應用於臨床診斷。<lb/>然而，其診斷效能常常受到固有的斑點噪聲影響，這會降低影像質量並掩蓋潛在的解剖結構。<lb/>現有的斑點減少方法往往過度平滑組織邊界，且對異質噪聲水平的泛化能力較差。<lb/>為了解決這些限制，我們提出了一種噪聲感知邊界增強生成學習（NBGL）框架，用於超聲斑點減少，該框架同時保留標註的解剖邊界並適應不同的噪聲水平。<lb/>NBGL框架由斑點減少分支和邊界增強分支組成。<lb/>前者利用生成學習來抑制斑點噪聲，而後者則學習邊界敏感的表示，以保留目標解剖結構。<lb/>此外，噪聲感知互動權重生成（NIWG）模塊通過3D拉普拉斯濾波和中位數絕對偏差估計器來估算斑點噪聲水平，並將其轉換為自適應互動權重。<lb/>這個權重被納入加權特徵線性調制（wFiLM）模塊中，以自適應地調節跨分支特徵耦合，從而提高對不同噪聲水平的穩健性。<lb/>在141個3D經陰道超聲體積上的廣泛評估顯示，NBGL在六種噪聲水平下在斑點減少和結構保留方面始終優於最先進的方法，同時保持與標註的解剖邊界的一致性。
2606.25009.author: Yuexi Gu et.al.
2606.25009.authors: Yuexi Gu, Mengqi Wu, Yongheng Sun, Virginie Papadopoulou, Mingxia Liu, Maureen Kohi
